help.description: Specifies details for the Help section.

folderName.description: Help folder name which contains the help description and images.

appbar.description: Provides configuration to the appbar fixture. If not supplied, the default appbar controls are displayed.

basemap.description: Whether or not to show the basemap selector button in the appbar.

geosearch.description: Whether or not to show the geosearch button in the appbar. The button will be hidden if geosearch component is disabled or no search service URLs are provided.

legend.description: Whether or not to show the layers button in the appbar.

details.description: Provides configuration to the details fixture.

items.description: Link a custom details template for a defined layer.

layerId.description: Custom Vue component to render as details template. Layer ID must exist.

geosearch.description: Provides configuration to the geosearch fixture.

enabled.description: Specifies if geosearch functionality is enabled.

legend.description: Provides configuration to the legend fixture.

isOpen.description: Specifies whether legend panel is open by default.

reorderable.description: Specifies whether layers in legend panel are reorderable.

entryGroup.description: A legend group element that can contain child elements to form a nested legend structure.

hidden.description: Indicates that the legend group will be hidden from the UI.

expanded.description: Specifies if legend group is expanded by default.

items.description: All possible controls to be enabled/disabled on a legend group.
All possible controls to be enabled/disabled on a single legend entry.

layerId.description: Link to a layer defined in the layers section of config.

hidden.description: Indicates that the legend block will be hidden from the UI and all its controls will be inaccessible to the user.

items.description: Additional layer ids which are controlled by this layer. Controlled layers cannot have enabled `boundingBox` and `query` states.

entryIndex.description: Index of the 'sublayer' in the case of an ESRI dynamic layer.

entryId.description: Id of the 'sublayer' in the case of an OGC WMS layer.

coverIcon.description: An optional icon used to represent the layer.

description.description: Optional description displayed above the symbology stack on mouse hover.

symbologyRenderStyle.description: An optional style, describes how the symbology stack should be rendered.

symbologyExpanded.description: Indicates if symbology stack is expand by default

symbologyStack.description: A collection of image-label pairings making up a layer's symbology stack.

image.description: Either a data URI or a URL to a source that supports CORS headers.

sqlQuery.description: An SQL where clause by which the map and datatable attributes can be filtered. All the query results for the symbologyStack should cover all attributes for that layer.

infoSection.description: Static content that can be added to a legend.

content.description: Actual content of the section - description of title/text or URL to image file.

visibilitySet.description: A visibility set legend element with only one child element visible at all times.

collapse.description: Renders a visiblity set as a single legend entry.

exclusiveVisibility.description: A list of legend elements forming the visibility set.

navbar.description: Provides configuration to the navbar. If not supplied the default navbar buttons are shown.

zoomOption.description: Specifies between zoom buttons or zoom sliders.

items.description: Map navigation buttons to be displayed on navbar.

layerList.description: List of defined layers to be displayed, added to the map in the same order it appears in this list.

basicLayerNode.description: Properties describing a generic layer type that can represent an ESRI tile/image layer.

id.description: Identification of the layer for referencing within the viewer (does not relate directly to any external service).

url.description: Service endpoint of the layer. It should match the type provided in layerType.

refreshInterval.description: The automatic refresh interval of the layer in minutes. Maximum interval is 100 minutes.

expectedResponseTime.description: The time span after which a 'slow-to-respond' notification is shown for any loading or refreshing layer.

metadataUrl.description: Metadata url of the layer service.

catalogueUrl.description: Catalogue url of the layer service.

layerType.description: Service type shorthand for basic layers. Defaults to ESRI Image Server.

dynamicLayerNode.description: Properties describing an ESRI Dynamic Layer which is rendered as a group by default.

id.description: Identification of the layer for referencing within the viewer (does not relate directly to any external service).

name.description: The display name of the layer. If not present, the viewer will make an attempt to scrape this information.

url.description: The service endpoint of the layer. It should match the type provided in layerType.

refreshInterval.description: The automatic refresh interval of the layer in minutes. Maximum interval is 100 minutes.

expectedResponseTime.description: The time span after which a 'slow-to-respond' notification is shown for any loading or refreshing layer.

metadataUrl.description: Metadata url of the layer service.

catalogueUrl.description: Catalogue url of the layer service.

layerType.description: Service type shorthand for dynamic layers.

toggleSymbology.description: Allows individual symbols to have visibility toggled on/off.

singleEntryCollapse.description: Indicates that the dynamic layer with a single layer entry should be rendered without the root group.

layerEntries.description: Layer entries rendered as part of the dynamic group.

imageFormat.description: The format of the layer image output.

fieldMetadataEntry.description: Specifies options for a field in a layer.

data.description: Specifies the field name (data) to use to link to the identifier. Must exist in the layer. TODO: CHANGE NAME

alias.description: Specifies the field title. If missing, attempts to use the service alias, then defaults to the field name.

featureLayerNode.description: Properties describing an ESRI Feature Layer.

id.description: Identification of the layer for referencing within the viewer (does not relate directly to any external service).

tooltipField.description: The field to be used for tooltips. If not present, the viewer will use nameField (if provided).

outfields.description: A list of attribute names that should be requested on query.

url.description: The service endpoint of the layer. It should match the type provided in layerType.

refreshInterval.description: Automatic refresh interval of the layer in minutes. Maximum interval is 100 minutes.

expectedResponseTime.description: The time span after which a 'slow-to-respond' notification is shown for any loading or refreshing layer.

metadataUrl.description: Metadata url of the layer service.

catalogueUrl.description: Catalogue url of the layer service.

layerType.description: Service type shorthand for feature layers.

toggleSymbology.description: Allows individual symbols to have visibility toggled on/off.

customRenderer.description: Optional renderer object to apply to the layer. Follows ESRI ArcGIS Server json convention.

fieldMetadata.description: Specifies options for the fields of a layer.

fileLayerNode.description: Properties describing a file layer (also an ESRI feature layer).

id.description: Identification of the layer for referencing within the viewer (does not relate directly to any external service)

nameField.description: Display field of the layer. If not present, the viewer will make an attempt to find the first valid field.

tooltipField.description: The field to be used for tooltips. If not present, the viewer will use nameField (if provided).

url.description: Url path to the file.  It should match the type provided in layerType.

color.description: Hex code representing the layer symbology color.

layerType.description: Service type shorthand for file layers.

fileType.description: Specifies a supported RAMP file type - CSV, GeoJSON, or Zipped ShapeFile.

latField.description: The latitude field of the layer (only for CSVs).

longField.description: The longitude field of the layer (only for CSVs).

customRenderer.description: Optional renderer object to apply to the layer. Follows ESRI ArcGIS Server json convention.

fieldMetadata.description: Specifies options for the fields of a layer.

wfsLayerNode.description: Properties describing a WFS layer (also an ESRI feature layer).

id.description: Identification of the layer for referencing within the viewer (does not relate directly to any external service).

name.description: Display name of the layer. If not present, the viewer will make an attempt to scrape this information.

nameField.description: Display field of the layer. If not present, the viewer will make an attempt to scrape this information.

tooltipField.description: The field to be used for tooltips. If not present, the viewer will use nameField (if provided).

url.description: The service endpoint of the layer. It should match the type provided in layerType.

color.description: The hex code representing the layer symbology color.

layerType.description: Service type shorthand for WFS layers.

xyInAttribs.description: Indicates if the point co-ords should be copied to the feature attributes. Ignored for lines and polygons.

customRenderer.description: Optional renderer object to apply to the layer. Follows ESRI ArcGIS Server json convention.

fieldMetadata.description: Specifies options for the fields of a layer.

id.description: Identification of the layer for referencing within the viewer (does not relate directly to any external service).

name.description: Display name of the layer. If not present, the viewer will make an attempt to scrape this information.

url.description: Service endpoint of the layer. It should match the type provided in layerType.

refreshInterval.description: Automatic refresh interval of the layer in minutes. Maximum interval is 100 minutes.

expectedResponseTime.description: The time span after which a 'slow-to-respond' notification is shown for any loading or refreshing layer.

metadataUrl.description: Metadata url of the layer service.

catalogueUrl.description: Catalogue url of the layer service.

suppressGetCapabilities.description: Prevents a getCapabilities request, instead relying on info provided in layerEntries.

layerEntries.description: Layer entries rendered as part of the WMS legend block.

layerType.description: Service type shorthand for WMS layers.

featureInfoMimeType.description: Specifies if GetFeatureInfo should be enabled for this WMS and indicates the format that should be requested.

legendMimeType.description: Specifies if GetLegendGraphic should be enabled for this WMS and indicates the format that should be requested.

visibility.description: Initial visibility of layer on map.

boundingBox.description: Specifies whether or not to display a bounding box.

query.description: Specifies whether or not to allow querying.

snapshot.description: Retrieve all feature data immediately on load.

hovertips.description: Specifies whether or not to disable hovertips.

columns.description: An array to specify how the columns (properties) of the table are defined. If a column is not present in the array, it is treated as disabled.

search.description: Configures the datatable global search functionality.

enabled.description: Whether global search is enabled by default.

value.description: Specifies the default filter to apply to a table (for global search).

showFilter.description: Specifies if the column filters are displayed on table load.

applyMap.description: Specifies if column filters are applied to the map by default.

filterByExtent.description: Specifies if the table should filter rows by extent by default.

columnNode.description: Specifies column properties. The ordering of columns in the table header is the same as the order they appear in this array.

data.description: The field name (data) to use to link to the layer column. Must exist in the layer.

title.description: Column title, uses the layer column name or alias if missing.

visible.description: Specifies if column is visible by default.

width.description: Specifies the column width. The minimum and default column width is set to 100px.

sort.description: Specifies if column requires to be sorted, either in ascending or descending order.

searchable.description: Specifies if column can be filtered.

filterNode.description: Specifies the filter properties for a column.

type.description: Specifies the filter type to use for a column. Defaults to being filtered as a string.

tileSchemaNode.description: A unique combination of an LOD and an extent set (each basemap must fit into a tile schema).

id.description: A unique id identifying a tile schema (combination of an extent set and a zoom scale).

default.description: Default name that can be traced to a value containing extent set and lod set hardcoded data.

name.description: The name to display in the basemap selector for the set of basemaps referencing this schema.

extentSetId.description: Link to extent set data defined in map.extentSets. This should be provided when no hardcoded default value exists or if the default value needs to be overridden.

lodSetId.description: Optional identification link to lod set data defined in map.lodSets. This can be used to override hardcoded default value.

basemapNode.description: Properties of a basemap to be displayed in the basemap selector panel.

id.description: A unique identifier for the basemap.

name.description: Name of the basemap used for labeling.

description.description: Description of the basemap. Becomes visible when basemap selector is expanded.

altText.description: Alt text for the basemap thumbnail image.

thumbnailUrl.description: Path to image file to display in the basemap selector.

tileSchemaId.description: The tile schema associated with this basemap.

layers.description: A set of URLs which should be composited to form a basemap entry.

attributionNode.description: Custom attribution and logo for associated basemap when selected.

enabled.description: Specifies if basemap attribution text is enabled.

value.description: Contains the attribution value. If empty, it will use copyright text from the server.

enabled.description: Specifies if basemap attribution logo is enabled.

link.description: URL to go to when clicked.

extentSetNode.description: Configuration for all required extent properties.

id.description: Identification for extent set that is mainly referenced by a tile schema.

full.description: The full extent; default will be used if not supplied.

maximum.description: The maximum extent; full or default extents will be used if not supplied.

extentNode.description: Map extent defined by min/max xy-coordinates.

extentWithReferenceNode.description: Map extent defined by min/max xy-coordinates and spatial reference.

spatialReferenceNode.description: Spatial reference properties to help define map projection.

wkid.description: An ESRI well known id denoting a projection.

latestWkid.description: An ESRI well known id denoting a projection.

wkt.description: A well known type projection definition.

lodSetNode.description: Details for a specific tile schema.

id.description: Identification for a lod set that is mainly referenced by a tile schema.

items.description: Level of details for a tile schema - zoom scales.

language.description: The language of the strings used in the configuration file.

version.description: The schema version used to validate the configuration file. The schema should enumerate the list of versions accepted by this version of the viewer.

ui.description: Configuration for required UI map components.

title.description: An optional title to be used in the place of the default viewer title.

fullscreen.description: Indicates if viewer takes up entire viewport.

restrictNavigation.description: Specifies whether or not to restrict user from panning beyond the maximum map extent.

openTable.description: Specifies whether the table panel for the layer referenced by a given id is open by default.

id.description: The id of the layer for referencing within the viewer.

isOpen.description: Specifies if table panel is open/closed on initial loading of the map.

legend.description: Provides configuration to legend. If not supplied, a blank legend is displayed.

appbar.description: Provides configuration to the appbar. If not supplied, default appbar controls are displayed.

navbar.description: Provides configuration to the appbar. If not supplied, default appbar controls are displayed.

geosearch.description: Provides configuration to geosearch. If not supplied, default geosearch services are used.

identify.description: Provides configuration to identify results and details panel. Default to no user custom templates.

layers.description: Layer list in the order which they should be added to the map. Defaults to no layers.

extentSets.description: The default, full and maximum extents of the map.

lodSets.description: The levels of detail (zoom scales) available for the map

initialBasemapId.description: Initial basemap to load. If not supplied, viewer will select a default basemap.

basemaps.description: A list of basemaps to be made available via the basemap selector.
